user_query: I want to study the impact of COVID-19 on job postings by calculating weekly and daily average percent changes.

TaskList.description: Collect historical data on job postings over a specified period during COVID-19.
Calculate the weekly average percent change of job postings using the collected data.
Calculate the daily average percent change of employment using employment data over the same period.
Compile and present the findings on the impact of COVID-19 on job postings, including both weekly and daily changes.
